name: Content Management Systems
description: CMS platforms for building websites, blogs, and content-driven applications

attributes.name: Description
attributes.description: Brief description of the CMS's main value proposition

attributes.name: Website
attributes.description: Official website

attributes.name: Repository
attributes.description: GitHub or GitLab repository URL

attributes.name: License
attributes.description: Software license (MIT, GPL-3.0, Apache-2.0, Proprietary, etc.)

attributes.name: Initial Release
attributes.description: Year of first public release

attributes.name: Latest Release
attributes.description: Date of most recent stable release

attributes.name: GitHub Stars
attributes.description: Number of GitHub stars

attributes.name: CMS Type
attributes.description: Architecture type: traditional (coupled), headless (API-only), or hybrid

attributes.name: Deployment Model
attributes.description: Deployment options: self-hosted, managed (SaaS), or both

attributes.name: Primary Language
attributes.description: Main programming language (PHP, Node.js, Python, Go, etc.)

attributes.name: Database Support
attributes.description: Supported database systems

attributes.name: API Type
attributes.description: API protocols supported

attributes.name: Multi-tenancy
attributes.description: Built-in support for multiple sites/projects from single installation

attributes.name: Static Site Generation
attributes.description: Can generate static HTML output (JAMstack compatible)

attributes.name: Edge Deployment
attributes.description: Supports edge/CDN deployment for content delivery

attributes.name: Content Types
attributes.description: Define custom content types/models (not just posts/pages)

attributes.name: Custom Fields
attributes.description: Add custom fields to content types

attributes.name: Field Types
attributes.description: Available field types for content modeling

attributes.name: Content Relationships
attributes.description: Link content items (one-to-one, one-to-many, many-to-many)

attributes.name: Nested Components
attributes.description: Reusable content components/blocks within entries

attributes.name: Localization
attributes.description: Multi-language content with locale management

attributes.name: Content Validation
attributes.description: Define validation rules for fields

attributes.name: Embedded Interactives
attributes.description: Embed interactive snippets, widgets, or micro frontends within content

attributes.name: Content Versioning
attributes.description: Track and restore previous versions of content

attributes.name: Draft/Publish Workflow
attributes.description: Separate draft and published states

attributes.name: Scheduled Publishing
attributes.description: Schedule content to publish/unpublish at specific times

attributes.name: Approval Workflows
attributes.description: Multi-step approval processes (submit, review, approve, reject)

attributes.name: Content Locking
attributes.description: Prevent concurrent editing conflicts

attributes.name: Audit Logging
attributes.description: Track who changed what and when

attributes.name: Media Library
attributes.description: Built-in media/asset management

attributes.name: Image Transformations
attributes.description: Resize, crop, optimize images on-the-fly

attributes.name: External Media Storage
attributes.description: Store media in S3, Cloudinary, or other external services

attributes.name: Video Support
attributes.description: Native video upload and/or streaming integration

attributes.name: SVG Support
attributes.description: Upload and serve SVG files

attributes.name: Folder Organization
attributes.description: Organize media in folders/collections

attributes.name: Role-Based Access
attributes.description: Define roles with specific permissions

attributes.name: Granular Permissions
attributes.description: Field-level or content-type-level permissions

attributes.name: SSO/SAML
attributes.description: Single sign-on integration (enterprise feature)

attributes.name: Team Collaboration
attributes.description: Comments, assignments, notifications for content teams

attributes.name: Audience Restrictions
attributes.description: Restrict content access by user groups, membership, or audience segments

attributes.name: TypeScript SDK
attributes.description: Official TypeScript/JavaScript SDK with types

attributes.name: Content Type SDK
attributes.description: Programmatically define content models (code-first approach)

attributes.name: CLI Tools
attributes.description: Command-line interface for management tasks

attributes.name: Local Development
attributes.description: Run locally for development; local preview for SaaS

attributes.name: Webhooks
attributes.description: Trigger external services on content changes

attributes.name: Plugin/Extension System
attributes.description: Extend functionality with plugins or custom code

attributes.name: Admin UI Customization
attributes.description: Customize the editorial interface

attributes.name: Documentation Quality
attributes.description: Quality of documentation (1=minimal, 5=excellent)

attributes.name: Frontend Frameworks
attributes.description: Official frontend framework integrations

attributes.name: Search Integration
attributes.description: Built-in search or integrations with Algolia, Elasticsearch, etc.

attributes.name: Preview Mode
attributes.description: Live preview of draft content in frontend

attributes.name: E-commerce Integration
attributes.description: Integrations with Stripe, Shopify, Snipcart, etc.

attributes.name: Analytics Integration
attributes.description: Built-in analytics or easy integration with GA, etc.

attributes.name: AI Features
attributes.description: AI-assisted content generation, translation, or optimization

attributes.name: CDN Included
attributes.description: Built-in CDN for content delivery (primarily for managed services)

attributes.name: Response Caching
attributes.description: Built-in API response caching

attributes.name: Rate Limits
attributes.description: API rate limits; 'unlimited' for self-hosted

attributes.name: Global Regions
attributes.description: Multi-region deployment available (for managed services)

attributes.name: Free Tier
attributes.description: Free plan available (for managed) or fully open-source (for self-hosted)

attributes.name: Open Source
attributes.description: Core product is open source

attributes.name: Pricing Model
attributes.description: Pricing structure

attributes.name: Commercial Support
attributes.description: Paid support or enterprise tier available

attributes.name: Enterprise Features
attributes.description: Enterprise-specific features (SSO, SLA, dedicated support)
